name: Season Statistics Summary
description: Comprehensive season overview infographic summarizing team performance across all competitions. Used at mid-season and end-of-season milestones.
guidelines: Multi-slide carousel: Slide 1 is the overview (W/D/L record, goals). Slide 2 covers top scorers and assisters. Slide 3 breaks down by competition (Industry League, Cup, Europe). Slide 4 shows notable records. Use clean data visualization with bar charts, pie charts, and stat cards. All data must be verified before posting.
